---
title: "Mary Dorothea Moultrie Coleridge"
---

## Mary Dorothea Moultrie Coleridge

**Dates:** (1886-1941)

### Description

younger daughter of Ernest Coleridge

### Biography

  She married (1911) Henry Burgh Gair (1882-1918) [Roels MS]

### Letters

- Letter from April 10th  [?16th 1887]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
